scripts.lint: biome lint biome.json index.html package.json src src-tauri/tauri.conf.json tsconfig.json vite.config.ts
scripts.format: biome format --write biome.json index.html package.json src src-tauri/tauri.conf.json tsconfig.json vite.config.ts
scripts.format:check: biome format biome.json index.html package.json src src-tauri/tauri.conf.json tsconfig.json vite.config.ts
scripts.verify:windows: corepack pnpm test && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml && corepack pnpm e2e:generic && corepack pnpm e2e:windows
scripts.verify:linux: corepack pnpm test && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml && corepack pnpm e2e:generic && corepack pnpm e2e:linux
scripts.verify:linux:headless: corepack pnpm test && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml && corepack pnpm tauri build --debug --no-bundle && corepack pnpm e2e:generic:headless && corepack pnpm e2e:linux:headless
